repos.name: PSU-CS-Academic-Projects.github.io
repos.description: A showcase website displaying all student projects from PSU-CS-Academic-Projects.

repos.name: bearcart
repos.description: Campus marketplace for PalSU - buy, sell, and request items within the university community.

repos.name: LinkAround
repos.description: A portfolio/data compiler for people who want to look for a job in the near future. WebSys final project. Django made.

repos.name: REALTIES---Property-Booking-System
repos.description: Realties — Property Booking Web App  A front-end web application for browsing, saving, and booking property viewings — built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Realties simulates a luxury real estate platform for the Philippine market, letting users log in, explore listings, save favorites, and schedule property viewings or virtual tours.

repos.name: Furnify-E-commerce-Utilizing-3D-Technology
repos.description: An e-commerce for furnitures, utilizing 3D technology

repos.name: DentaStream
repos.description: DentaStream: An Integrated Web Application for Clinical Workflow Automation

repos.name: MediConnect-Online-Consultation-System
repos.description: MediConnect — a telemedicine web app connecting patients with verified doctors for real-time consultations and digital prescription management.

repos.name: Ascendant-Language-Learning-Game
repos.description: A roguelike deck-building RPG that teaches language and programming concepts through strategic card-based combat.

repos.name: SwiftServe-Kiosk
repos.description: SwiftServe Kiosk is a self-service café ordering system that reduces wait times and order errors through customizable digital ordering, real-time order tracking, and automated thermal-style receipt generation.

repos.name: Meowy-WebSystems
repos.description: Premium cat food e-commerce platform featuring live inventory management, product variations, session-based carts, secure checkout, and a modern MVP shopping experience powered by server-side database integration.

repos.name: Tandikan-Home-Services-Booking-System
repos.description: A web-based home service booking and worker management system for customers, workers, and administrators.

repos.name: Don-Macchiatos
repos.description: Don Macchiatos is a coffee shop website developed for a local business, featuring an online menu, shopping cart, and pickup or delivery ordering system. The platform provides a professional digital presence while streamlining customer orders through an integrated web experience.

repos.name: Ambulance-Booking-System
repos.description: MediResponse is an ambulance booking and dispatch management system that streamlines emergency response through real-time booking, driver assignment, status tracking, fleet management, and reporting.

repos.name: BrewsLee
repos.description: A full-stack coffee shop online ordering system built for a real independent café in Palawan, Philippines. Customers can browse the menu, customize and place orders, and track them in real time. The owner gets a private dashboard to manage everything from live orders to analytics.

repos.name: Bouquet-System
repos.description: A full-stack flower e-commerce platform built with Next.js 16 and Supabase, featuring real-time order tracking and a dedicated admin dashboard.
